summary: Iteration 107 testing complete. All accuracy honesty features verified: 1) GET /api/accuracy/stats returns status:ok with total_tracked:0, has_enough_data:false (no fabricated numbers), 2) /accuracy page shows 'We are building our accuracy track record' message with honest placeholder state, 3) /accuracy page has all 3 required sections: 'How we measure accuracy' (3-step process: snapshot, track, report), 'What is real data vs what is estimated' (real data, estimates, not available), and 'Known limitations' (viral products, new categories, supplier pricing), 4) Fabricated '2,000+ sellers' claim removed from comparison pages and SEO landing pages - replaced with 'Free to start. No credit card required.', 5) /methodology page loads with 7 signals, 6) /sample-product-analysis shows confidence indicators and accuracy disclaimer, 7) /tools page shows calculator accuracy disclaimer, 8) Footer has Methodology and Accuracy links.
passed_tests: GET /api/accuracy/stats has all required fields (status, total_tracked, total_reviewed, has_enough_data, margin_accuracy_pct, trend_accuracy_pct, last_updated)
GET /api/accuracy/stats returns total_tracked:0, has_enough_data:false (no fabricated numbers)
GET /api/accuracy/stats returns null for margin_accuracy_pct and trend_accuracy_pct when not enough data
/accuracy page shows 'We are building our accuracy track record' placeholder state
/accuracy page has 'How we measure accuracy' section with 3 steps (snapshot, track, report)
/accuracy page has 'What is real data vs what is estimated' section with real data, estimates, and not available categories
/accuracy page has 'Known limitations' section with viral products, new categories, supplier pricing
No fabricated '85% margin accuracy' stat on accuracy page
No fabricated '2,000+ sellers' claim on accuracy page
No fabricated '2,000+ sellers' claim on comparison page (/compare/jungle-scout-vs-trendscout)
No fabricated '2,000+ sellers' claim on SEO landing page (/uk-product-research)
Replacement text 'Free to start. No credit card required.' found on comparison and landing pages
/methodology page loads with data-testid='methodology-page' and 7-signal framework
/sample-product-analysis shows confidence indicators and disclaimer text
critical_code_review_comments: AccuracyPage.jsx correctly fetches from /api/accuracy/stats and shows 'building' state when has_enough_data is false
accuracy.py endpoint returns real data from prediction_snapshots and prediction_reviews collections
review_prediction_accuracy task in tasks.py handles daily snapshotting and 30/90 day reviews
SeoLandingTemplate.jsx and ComparisonPage.jsx correctly replaced '2,000+ sellers' with 'Free to start. No credit card required.'

AccuracyPage.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all sections (accuracy-building, accuracy-method-snapshot, accuracy-method-track, accuracy-method-report, accuracy-data-types, accuracy-limitations)
test_credentials: None required for public pages and API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 107 verified all accuracy honesty features. The accuracy page now shows real data from the prediction tracking system (currently 0 tracked predictions, so 'building track record' state is shown). The fabricated '2,000+ sellers' and '85% accuracy' claims have been removed. The accuracy page has 3 honest sections: how we measure (3-step process), real vs estimated data, and known limitations. The backend accuracy endpoint returns has_enough_data:false when fewer than 5 predictions have been reviewed.

fabricated_claims_removed.replacement_text: Free to start. No credit card required.
